pr-evidence/validate-wheel-file-metadata.gpt55_review_summary: Initial GPT-5.5 review found empty Wheel-Version and non-universal filename tags could pass. Fixed both validations, added regressions, and re-review approved.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_release_bundle.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q
poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: release bundle wheel validation now checks WHEEL metadata for pure py3-none-any package wheels
release bundle wheel validation now rejects non-universal filename tags
pr-evidence/validate-wheel-file-metadata.why: strict release bundles should carry the pure Python document-kv-cache wheel actually suitable for open-source distribution and target runtime installation
